textByHash.04f5baacb4b4a34b8a187c167171e1552480625c: In that case you should tell this to your cat, 'No guts, no glory!'
textByHash.0d36498a2ee491f7cf15547773f12d2ae543fadc: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Stay in for as long as you can.'
textByHash.18cd63008f2ae7a8f46ddae82152b17e9f4a277d: They're nice, but the ones they have in Port Sarim are even better.
textByHash.1c721dc3a5e6e5f940e82688c72ad6bdf8e6f78d: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Go berserk!'
textByHash.1ff3fb723112f23575376c8a8deed6a7c946aef1: You'll find her in Port Sarim.
textByHash.21b4ab7e177dafb65f27b6ba94774c5b1d6bb4c6: Hrmph! The entrance to the pits of Ardougne are in the back of the Flying Horse in Ardougne.
textByHash.231dd296d08acf7d0ebdf5c45db50079ec2171a3: Years of blowin' smoke into rat holes, youngin'.
textByHash.327139bc7ea6ba37d4a08ea42e2f06e1544e941f: It depends on what kind of cat you have.
textByHash.370bb8a79f87feac70cf656a1b05dd8307fe16b9: I doubt he would be too far away from there.
textByHash.45bcb1aed5cec3cee0093faad2b7de8cba8f3a36: Well your best bet would be somewhere on the rough side of Varrock, the east side if I remember correctly.
textByHash.4af0c5133f5d2d686c7d193b815f77b5fadf510b: You should wear an Amulet of Catspeak. It will allow you to organise tactics with your cat.
textByHash.4c645d80ae36e6c4335318e43749a5ec928e4215: Ah the sisters, as strange a pair as you're ever likely to meet.
textByHash.509d4f7e4d911d6e645771640a1485f16493c266: Well if that's the case then your are left with two choices.
textByHash.52156e073c9d4a9f0c59625a6abff7083690893e: Ah, young Jimmy, he must be a made man by now.
textByHash.537eef5d439e52e7dc9fb97c72f4ede0b36a7352: That old brawler? Is he still knocking about?
textByHash.5848347c398ebafd4bf065e8cc3a17dd0a572011: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it
textByHash.62bac88e4f09c6740dd7ca0c26cd025a092ca92e: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Just take care of yourself cat.'
textByHash.6767e7bb8ee39ef093c13bc5f436e4517a62eada: Down the stairs to the basement of the 'Laughing Miner'. Get yourself a drink, too, you've earned it.
textByHash.6c8067766cf84ac43cec170f54ca0edcd28a20be: Here take this, you might find it useful.
textByHash.713332eff28715f95826aacfe2f3044ee2d46d43: In that case you should tell your cat: 'No guts, no glory!'
textByHash.720043b3d23d48ad48b3633bf5635b995d643780: Well what do you want to know?
textByHash.73e0d90b375e3582a59f321ff4dedf74f3d066c2: An extra pair of eyes or set of claws can often come in handy.
textByHash.7896c556bbda389e39d17f1eef708e294e330007: You're most likely to find them in the sewers of Varrock.
textByHash.78b6b89d1b963d59c8a104437bfbdf7234dd5821: Or, go for a less aggressive stance, which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.
textByHash.7a96913730577a55b240d9c5d8c4d15015bd3888: Your other option is to adopt a less defensive strategy which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.
textByHash.7eac99a251b1c982cac571558a53f4f8d04d99e9: Well, I suppose there's no harm tellin' you.
textByHash.8026bf52b847bcd743269d7f98cf53c023091069: What do you want to know?
textByHash.858e2eb5da249fac454f27b05cb51a7e958261a9: You'll find them in the sewers of Varrock.
textByHash.889104b3cfd80589773e5944f12c505023525566: Ah, Queen Muck, you'll probably find her in the Port Sarim pits.
textByHash.9ab6c1e2d6d63f8e06acac731893dfeb6d438280: Or you can adopt a less defensive strategy, which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.
textByHash.9b5360ca7b594e523605c160ce553704d29cbab7: Have you got that job done yet, youngin'?
textByHash.9bce42f5627c2d1f070285ae28f269a9163d6b53: Ah, the boss herself. You'll probably find her in the Port Sarim rat pits.
textByHash.9c040c41b9e76ed31ee7c483556936870e0c04dc: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Stay in for as long as you can.'
textByHash.a08157a4f181cadd90331e106f5366bb08bb12a9: Say, when the job's done, how about I show you to the Rat Pits here in Keldagrim?
textByHash.a1097483ac6734827d44b01e1850c2e6ab111c79: Ah young Jimmy, he must be a made man by now.
textByHash.ab18816bd5ae0f9ed606a499465263450185b5d8: I'm trying to smoke these pesky rats out. Ahem-hem-hem.
textByHash.ac3c6b8c31f12cd918c3c8e1da94a08128b0ccad: I'll - ugh - I'll be fine, youngin'. My lungs just aren't up for ratcatchin' like they used to be.
textByHash.b5a56ea48bd68417c36d0d281f887540e56c55f3: Hrmph! His old waterin' hole was the Flying Horse in Ardougne.
textByHash.b8b4da058a39643d73626f1ae05666b59358352e: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Go berserk!'
textByHash.bda17df140f89101f9ca5102b7648b887d34b21b: Ah, the sisters Grime, as strange a pair as you're ever likely to meet.
textByHash.be5b39c0cf0ec6b55f2a5840f21b136743c6d9d2: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence, the drawback to this is that your cat will flee sooner.
textByHash.c0adde331ccfb2a8fd9746b33b30f0b950b73b28: Better with you helpin' me out, youngin'.
textByHash.c5d1759158bb814ab9649e9192bdee9d817990e2: Try the stairs into the basement of the 'Laughing Miner'. A grand watering hole it is. My cat should be standing next to it.
textByHash.c88739adf3c8b6b7012b30cee6c8a24618271026: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence but causes it to flee sooner.
textByHash.cb465e9d3eafe1d89ca1dd5b2db9864a6830a081: Just take a simple pot and stick some ordinary garden weeds in it. Then light the pot and use it on a rat hole.
textByHash.cd1bfe51bb68853b879970b373d618e6e89f8d09: Do you have any other questions about the pits?
textByHash.d3d1fa7f090eda4ec1df71748a8d06a92e0aba46: Look for her in Port Sarim.
textByHash.d79563c7530f7c36570a67719233ef7773ba878c: Well, your best bet would be somewhere on the east side of Varrock. It's rough around there though, be careful.
textByHash.d79ff182c4a8702934cc39ccc20f1074bdbcd6d8: I remember when he was a lad...
textByHash.da5aebadc58bb6d237b45e5ab0ea1507df081746: Well if that's the case then you're left with two choices.
textByHash.daed00b0f9a22bf7c22c47bbb96ae84e06a3cb36: Oh yes! It's the best place to train your wily cat.
textByHash.dfa496b19d92f27c5ce4baa4ef17def901398608: In the Keldagrim pits, your cat will grow wiser by gaining more experience.
textByHash.e20d83ca1608c2800b8aa71c4e48b3d886a5a674: You'd better make your own then. A-hem-hem.
textByHash.e41bfea4c1720be75934a7edb7add327a0f5f3d2: In that case you are left with two choices.
textByHash.e7730b6aa5e96c06354e6860ac8f48a3f50d1302: That old brawler? Is he still knockin' about?
textByHash.ea2ed48682331758d7376a6a10d19891fe639ddb: simple. Take this pot, light the contents, and blow the smoke into the hole.
textByHash.ee585f351f6902ad064abecb024be929c0ab7179: or go for a less aggressive stance which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.
textByHash.f06e8a0715cf5828217336abfcfc4a20a9802562: Down the stairs into the basement of the 'Laughing Miner'. A grand waterin' hole it is. Just look for The Beast, you'll find it.
textByHash.f54130bfe4fdd0639394e9fefb0dcf9b648eef42: You offered to help me out.
textByHash.f56bcddfd9343c49ae5faf1b1a30ce23d0206abe: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Just take care of yourself, cat.'
textByHash.fab49f2f11cd2df1ddf4e8170c42d4bee628159a: Look for 'The Face' in Port Sarim. She'll show you.
textByHash.fade9a4ca2d0c7aefe8078cee70fa0669622dce1: Well, that depends on your outlook, whether you're ready to risk your cat's life or not and how defensive or aggressive you want your cat to be.
textByHash.fcab10ba4a5090ba31825e6c8fe988e20ae79211: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it.
textByHash.fcc3707f16fb29f242f9978b89523a4124d18e7d: I'd better show you our rat pits here in Keldagrim.
textByHash.fd595098ec995470612e3731179ac5e0d054efbf: Blimey, that's my old crew! How are they all?
textByHash.fd9e0f8ffedbfa39906fd954247a7b8938891e07: Aye, this pot. What's wrong with it?
textByHash.ff510b8773e1f9edff0a01a3e67ec6404bc7c1c2: Here take this, you might find it useful
